header.title: Switch
header.subtitle: Toggle control for binary on/off settings. Provides immediate visual feedback with a sliding thumb. Supports two sizes and an optional label with description.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A switch is composed of a hidden native input, a track that changes color when checked, and a thumb that slides from left to right.

parts.input: Hidden native checkbox. Receives focus and keyboard events.
parts.track: Pill-shaped background. Gray when off, accent color when on.
parts.thumb: White circle that slides along the track via CSS :has().
parts.label: Short text identifying the setting. Rendered as a span inside the label element.

states.title: States
states.description: Switch supports on, off, and disabled states. Keyboard-focusable with a visible focus ring.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Two size presets. Use sm in dense settings panels; md is the default for standalone toggles.

withLabel.title: With label and description
withLabel.description: Pass label and description props to provide context for the toggle.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native input attributes except type. Component-specific props listed below.

props.label: Label text rendered next to the switch.
props.description: Supporting text rendered below the label.
props.size: Size preset: sm (28x16px) or md (36x20px, default).
props.extendsNote: Extends all native input attributes except type (name, value, onChange, …).
